name: context-cartographer
description: Explore existing repositories, infer architecture, and maintain a high-signal PROJECT_CONTEXT.md for future work.

interface.shortDescription: Explore a repo and build PROJECT_CONTEXT.md
interface.longDescription: Use Context Cartographer to inspect an existing repository, infer the architecture and developer workflow, and leave behind a concise PROJECT_CONTEXT.md that future engineers or AI sessions can trust.
defaultPrompt: Explore this existing repo, infer how it works, and create or update PROJECT_CONTEXT.md without changing product code.
